goal: Restyle the main menu Story entry as an art-textured button matching the visual language of the other three menu buttons, with a new color palette and fixed text '争鸣史'.
constraints: Keep current menu navigation behavior unchanged.
Follow existing art-button composition style used by start/characters/collection buttons.
Only adjust Story button presentation and wording.
deliverables: Story button uses textured image style consistent with other menu buttons.
Story button color scheme changed to a distinct new palette.
Story button visible title fixed to '争鸣史'.
